title: The Elon Musk Post Series — Wait But Why
text:
# The Elon Musk Post Series

March 28, 2017 By Tim Urban

In 2015, I got a call from Elon Musk. Not something you expect to happen. What ensued was a six-month deep dive into the world of Elon and his companies and four long articles about what I found. Here they are:

[**Post 1: About Elon—and an intro to the whole series**](https://waitbutwhy.com/2015/05/elon-musk-the-worlds-raddest-man.html)

[**Post 2: The full story with Tesla**](https://waitbutwhy.com/2015/06/how-tesla-will-change-your-life.html)

[**Post 3: The full story with SpaceX**](https://waitbutwhy.com/2015/08/how-and-why-spacex-will-colonize-mars.html)

[**Post 4: About Elon’s secret sauce—the way he thinks**](https://waitbutwhy.com/2015/11/the-cook-and-the-chef-musks-secret-sauce.html)

Then, in 2017, Elon started a new company, and I dove back in:

> Long Neuralink piece coming out on [@waitbutwhy](https://twitter.com/waitbutwhy?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw) in about a week. Difficult to dedicate the time, but existential risk is too high not to.
> 
> — Elon Musk (@elonmusk) [March 28, 2017](https://twitter.com/elonmusk/status/846580443797368832?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw)
> 
> 

And two months later, another post:

[****Neuralink and the Brain’s Magical Future****](https://waitbutwhy.com/neuralink)

**Finally, three shorter articles about other corners of the Elon world:**

Mini-posts on the **[Hyperloop](https://waitbutwhy.com/2015/06/hyperloop.html)** and **[solar energy](https://waitbutwhy.com/2015/06/the-deal-with-solar.html)**

And a post about **[SpaceX’s giant rocket](https://waitbutwhy.com/2016/09/spacexs-big-fking-rocket-the-full-story.html)** that will take people to Mars

[Tweet](https://twitter.com/share)
